task: Redesign NarrativeSection and CTASection to visually match the upgraded cinematic ShoeHero — currently these are plain text blocks with only fade-up animation and no visual relationship to the hero
design_principles: Alternate background tone per section (cream / charcoal / cream / charcoal-CTA) so scrolling feels like moving through distinct chapters rather than one flat page
Carry the hero's brass radial glow motif into dark sections for continuity
Add an eyebrow label + hairline rule above each title, using the same tracking-widest brand typography as the hero subtitle
Add a large low-opacity serif numeral watermark behind each section for editorial/magazine weight
Add a short animated gradient underline beneath each title that draws in on scroll instead of appearing instantly
CTA button changes from solid burgundy fill to outlined brass, to feel restrained/luxury rather than like a standard ecommerce banner

changes.description: Extend props to support alternating dark/light background and a chapter number/label
add_props: index: number  // used for chapter numeral, e.g. '01', '02', '03'
variant?: 'light' | 'dark'  // defaults to 'light', pass 'dark' for even-indexed sections
changes.notes: Existing props (id, title, paragraphs[], align) remain unchanged

changes.description: Wrap the section in a variant-aware background, replacing the current flat bg
changes.remove: section: min-h-[80vh] flex items-center py-24 px-4  (on default/cream background only)
add_jsx: <section id={id} className={`relative min-h-[80vh] flex items-center py-24 px-4 overflow-hidden ${variant === 'dark' ? 'bg-charcoal' : 'bg-cream'}`}>

<div className="absolute w-[260px] h-[260px] rounded-full pointer-events-none" style={{ background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(181,152,90,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%)', top: '50%', [align === 'right' ? 'right' : 'left']: '-40px', transform: 'translateY(-50%)' }} />
{/* existing content wrapper goes here, unchanged except color tokens below */}
changes.notes: The radial glow div is dark-mode only per the design; light/cream sections stay flat to avoid muddying the brand's clean daytime look

changes.description: Add eyebrow label + hairline rule above the title, replacing the bare heading
changes.location: Immediately above the existing <motion.h2> title element
add_jsx: <span className="w-6 h-px bg-burgundy" style={{ order: align === 'right' ? 2 : 0 }} />
<span className="text-[11px] tracking-[0.25em] uppercase" style={{ color: variant === 'dark' ? '#b5985a' : '#722f37' }}>

changes.description: Add an animated gradient underline beneath the title that draws in on scroll
changes.location: Immediately below the existing <motion.h2> title element, before the paragraphs

changes.description: Update title and paragraph text colors to remain readable on the dark variant
changes.location: Existing title and paragraph className/style bindings
changes.change: Title color: text-charcoal (light) -> conditionally text-cream (dark). Paragraph color: text-muted-foreground (light) -> conditionally rgba(245,245,245,0.55) (dark)

changes.description: Pass the new index/chapterLabel/variant props when rendering each NarrativeSection, alternating variant
example_jsx: <NarrativeSection id="values" index={1} chapterLabel="Chapter one — values" variant="light" align="center" title="The Art of the Shoe" paragraphs={[...]} />
<NarrativeSection id="journey" index={2} chapterLabel="Chapter two — craft" variant="dark" align="right" title="Craftsmanship in Motion" paragraphs={[...]} />
<NarrativeSection id="purpose" index={3} chapterLabel="Chapter three — purpose" variant="light" align="left" title="Built for Moments That Matter" paragraphs={[...]} />

changes.description: Replace flat background with a dark gradient card carrying the hero's brass glow, matching the redesigned CTA card
changes.remove: section: min-h-[60vh] flex items-center justify-center py-24 px-4  (on default background)
add_jsx: <section className="relative min-h-[60vh] flex items-center justify-center py-24 px-4 overflow-hidden" style={{ background: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #1a1a1a, #0f0d0c)' }}>

<div className="absolute rounded-full pointer-events-none" style={{ width: '260px', height: '260px', left: '50%', top: '30%', transform: 'translate(-50%, -50%)', background: 'radial-gradient(circle, rgba(181,152,90,0.25) 0%, transparent 70%)' }} />
{/* existing content wrapper, with text colors updated per cta-text-color-update below */}

changes.description: Update heading/paragraph colors for the new dark background
changes.change: Heading: text-charcoal -> text-cream. Paragraph: text-muted-foreground -> rgba(245,245,245,0.55)

changes.description: Replace solid burgundy CTA button with an outlined brass button for a more restrained, luxury feel
changes.remove: inline-block bg-burgundy text-white px-8 py-3 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-charcoal transition-colors duration-300
changes.add: inline-block bg-transparent border border-brass text-brass px-8 py-3 text-sm tracking-widest uppercase hover:bg-brass hover:text-charcoal transition-colors duration-300

verification_steps: Confirm sections visually alternate cream/charcoal/cream down the page and the transition doesn't feel jarring on scroll
Confirm the brass radial glow only appears on dark-variant sections, not on cream sections
Confirm the ghost numeral (01/02/03) is visible but subtle, not competing with the title for attention
Confirm the eyebrow label color adapts correctly per variant (brass on dark, burgundy on light)
Confirm the animated underline draws in after the eyebrow label but before/alongside the paragraph reveal, not simultaneously with the title
Confirm all text passes basic contrast check on both light and dark variants
Confirm the CTA button's hover state (brass fill, charcoal text) is legible
Test on mobile widths to confirm the ghost numeral and glow don't overflow or cause horizontal scroll
